calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Requests For Admissions Set No. One Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Requests For Admissions Set No. One Be Deemed Admitted.

The People's unopposed Motion For Order That Requests For Admissions Set No. One Be Deemed Admitted is GRANTED.

The record demonstrates the People served their Requests for Admission, Set One on Claimant Andrew Phillips, the requests appear reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence (see Code of Civil Procedure section 2017.010), Claimant did not provide any responses to Plaintiff's Request For Admissions. Set One. Claimant's failure to timely respond is not excused. No meet and confer requirement when no responses have been provided.

Plaintiffs' RFAs, Set One, addressed to Andrew Phillips are deemed admitted by Andrew Phillips. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.280.)

Prior to the hearing, The People shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order repeating the above verbatim.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
